title: Add GraphQL plugin
description: Pull existing graphql-js types and whole schemas into Pothos with the add option or the addGraphQL methods.

steps.title: Import an existing schema
steps.description: Add a whole graphql-js schema at builder setup and reference its types by name

steps.title: Refs for individual types
steps.description: Use the addGraphQL methods to get a ref for one type at a time and customize it as you import
